messages.message: Fast refresh only works when a file only exports components. Use a new file to share constants or functions between components.

messages.message: The 'allCategories' logical expression could make the dependencies of useMemo Hook (at line 31) change on every render. To fix this, wrap the initialization of 'allCategories' in its own useMemo() Hook.
